name: Bill Goodwin
abstract: Bill Goodwin (born Los Angeles, California, January 8, 1942) is an American jazz drummer.

interviews.title: Bill Goodwin interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 28, 2025

concerts.label: Jazz: The Personal Dimension: Gary Burton Quartet
Jazz: The Personal Dimension: Toshiko Akiyoshi Quartet

works.t: Haru no umi (The Sea in Spring)

concerts.label: Jazz: The Personal Dimension: Gary Burton Quartet

about_quotes.speaker: Phil Woods
about_quotes.evidence: Bill and Steve and been with me through everything... We’ve been together 35 years, Bill Goodwin, Steve Gilmore and I.
about_quotes.doc_title: Phil Woods — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Tony Marino
about_quotes.evidence: I hooked up with him and we had a guitar trio with our late great friend Vic Juris
about_quotes.doc_title: Tony Marino interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, August 25, 2025

about_quotes.speaker: Phil Woods
about_quotes.evidence: Bill Goodwin, Steve Gilmore and I, we’ve been working together for 26 years now.
about_quotes.doc_title: Phil Woods interviewed by Monk Rowe, Delaware Water Gap, PA, November 8, 1999

about_quotes.speaker: Steve Gilmore
about_quotes.evidence: Phil Woods came back and started to live in this very area, and he started dating Bill Goodwin’s sister... anyway that’s where we all met
about_quotes.doc_title: Steve Gilmore interviewed by Monk Rowe, Delaware Water Gap, PA, November 8, 1999

about_quotes.speaker: Bobby Hutcherson
about_quotes.evidence: Her brother, Bill Goodwin, the drummer, whose father was Bill Goodwin, who did the Maxwell House Coffee on the Burns and Allen Show.
about_quotes.doc_title: Bobby Hutcherson — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Aebersold Jamey
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] ...Bill Goodwin. [INTERVIEWEE] Yes. He made several of them while he was with the Phil Woods group.
about_quotes.doc_title: Aebersold Jamey — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
